name: Warehouse in Oragadam
description: A Grade-A warehouse facility located in the prime industrial hub of Oragadam. Features state-of-the-art infrastructure, ample parking, and excellent connectivity to major highways. Ideal for large-scale distribution and logistics operations.

name: Warehouse in Bhiwandi
description: A massive, state-of-the-art warehousing facility in the logistical heart of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Perfect for national distribution centers.

name: Warehouse in Sriperumbudur
description: Upcoming large-scale warehousing space in the heart of Sriperumbudur. This listing is currently under review for approval. It promises excellent connectivity and modern specifications suitable for a variety of industries.

siteSpecifications.typeOfRoad: Gravel access road, to be tarred

name: Warehouse in Ambattur
description: An older facility that was submitted for listing but did not meet the required quality standards for Grade-A classification. The listing has been rejected due to compliance issues.

name: Warehouse in Hoskote
description: A modern, mid-sized warehouse suitable for electronics assembly, last-mile delivery, or light manufacturing. Located in a secured tech park with reliable power and infrastructure.

name: Warehouse in Faridabad
description: New facility pending approval. Located strategically to serve the NCR region. High-quality construction.

name: Warehouse in Coimbatore
